records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, I think I'm finished here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, I think I'm finished here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, I think I'm finished here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How about you? Are you hurt?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How about you? Are you hurt?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How about you? Are you hurt?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...No way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You instantly defeated those monsters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You instantly defeated those monsters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You instantly defeated those monsters.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Who
8g What are you? Do you have superpowers or something?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Who
8g What are you? Do you have superpowers or something?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Who
8g What are you? Do you have superpowers or something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, take a guess.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, take a guess.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, take a guess.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think it's normal for people to have animal ears like you and me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think it's normal for people to have animal ears like you and me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think it's normal for people to have animal ears like you and me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I guess having superpowers isn't technically wrong...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I guess having superpowers isn't technically wrong...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I guess having superpowers isn't technically wrong...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration calls people with abilities like us <color=#ffd34c>Counters</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration calls people with abilities like us <color=#ffd34c>Counters</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration calls people with abilities like us <color=#ffd34c>Counters</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because we're awakened with <color=#ffd34c>superpowers</color> after obtaining a <color=#ffd34c>Watch</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because we're awakened with <color=#ffd34c>superpowers</color> after obtaining a <color=#ffd34c>Watch</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because we're awakened with <color=#ffd34c>superpowers</color> after obtaining a <color=#ffd34c>Watch</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on, a Watch?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on, a Watch?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on, a Watch?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When you say Watch... do you mean this <color=#ffd34c>watch</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: When you say Watch... do you mean this <color=#ffd34c>watch</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: When you say Watch... do you mean this <color=#ffd34c>watch</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I have these stupid ears and tail because of this watch?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I have these stupid ears and tail because of this watch?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I have these stupid ears and tail because of this watch?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ho-oh, you catch on quick. But you're only half right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ho-oh, you catch on quick. But you're only half right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ho-oh, you catch on quick. But you're only half right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because not all Counters have ears and a tail like us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because not all Counters have ears and a tail like us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because not all Counters have ears and a tail like us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's actually closer to the opposite.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's actually closer to the opposite.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's actually closer to the opposite.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those ears and tail are the awakening of the <color=#ffd34c>Bygone Factor</color> that was <color=#ffd34c>originally</color> latent in you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those ears and tail are the awakening of the <color=#ffd34c>Bygone Factor</color> that was <color=#ffd34c>originally</color> latent in you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those ears and tail are the awakening of the <color=#ffd34c>Bygone Factor</color> that was <color=#ffd34c>originally</color> latent in you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, but there is no modern medical advice I can give you regarding your ears and tail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, but there is no modern medical advice I can give you regarding your ears and tail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, but there is no modern medical advice I can give you regarding your ears and tail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that they are connected at the cellular level, as if they were there this whole time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that they are connected at the cellular level, as if they were there this whole time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that they are connected at the cellular level, as if they were there this whole time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That means... that I was never an ordinary human being?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That means... that I was never an ordinary human being?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That means... that I was never an ordinary human being?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. You could say that your current image comes closer to your essence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. You could say that your current image comes closer to your essence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. You could say that your current image comes closer to your essence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the Watch simply makes that possibility into reality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the Watch simply makes that possibility into reality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the Watch simply makes that possibility into reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Congratulations!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Congratulations!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Congratulations!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seems like you're also like us who have a non-human ancestor mixed in the family tree.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seems like you're also like us who have a non-human ancestor mixed in the family tree.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seems like you're also like us who have a non-human ancestor mixed in the family tree.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then there are more of these "Bygones" like us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then there are more of these "Bygones" like us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then there are more of these "Bygones" like us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you think about it, you can say that we're compatriots.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you think about it, you can say that we're compatriots.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you think about it, you can say that we're compatriots.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? If you follow me, I'll answer some questions you're curious about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? If you follow me, I'll answer some questions you're curious about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? If you follow me, I'll answer some questions you're curious about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: About us, and... also about the truth of this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: About us, and... also about the truth of this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: About us, and... also about the truth of this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if I don't?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if I don't?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if I don't?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who knows. Because I have no intention of leaving an awakened Bygone Factor alone like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who knows. Because I have no intention of leaving an awakened Bygone Factor alone like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who knows. Because I have no intention of leaving an awakened Bygone Factor alone like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe if you're not willing to follow me, should I freeze and kidnap you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe if you're not willing to follow me, should I freeze and kidnap you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe if you're not willing to follow me, should I freeze and kidnap you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kidnap?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kidnap?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kidnap?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gah, you're horrible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gah, you're horrible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gah, you're horrible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, did you just find out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, did you just find out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, did you just find out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's it gonna be? Do you choose to come along, or do I have to kidnap you, stray cat?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's it gonna be? Do you choose to come along, or do I have to kidnap you, stray cat?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's it gonna be? Do you choose to come along, or do I have to kidnap you, stray cat?
